subject: Re: Tutorial question M
body:
Hi Nav,

Not sure what's going on but I've run the tutorial myself successfully
within the last week so there is likely user error somewhere...
things I would check:
- defocus handedness
- initial TS alignments
- input settings
- CTF fit ranges/quality

Cheers and sorry you're running into issues!

Alister

On Tue, 1 Apr 2025 at 12:42, Nav Matt <namatt.et@gmail.com> wrote:

> Hi all,
>
>
>
> I am going through the WarpTools tutorial for Apoferritin (EMPIAR –
> 10491). I have got 8.25 A resolution following refinement with RELION and
> generated a mask using RELION_mask_create to be used in M. When I use M
> core for checking the setup, I get 6.5 A resolution. However, when I run
> the first refinement, there is hardly any improvement in the resolution
> (6.25 A). I am using identical scripts as given in the tutorial.
>
> Could anyone suggest troubling shooting this issue?
>
>
> best,
>
> Nav
>
